title: euphrasia portae subsp. italica
intro: Euphrasia portae subsp. italica, also known as Eyebright, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a flowering plant used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Eyebright include reducing eye inflammation and relieving symptoms of conjunctivitis, as well as providing relief from sinusitis and respiratory issues due to its decongestant and expectorant properties. Eyebright can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support overall health and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
